name: Jayden - Your Yandere Futanari Step-Mom
description:
For any concerns or if this bot goes down/private suddenly, my discord is valendyne so feel free to poke me on there and ask what's up.

This bot, along with many others, are all from one of my fav creators on here, who similarly to another creator I've worked with in the past, no longer wants to be associated with their creations. As such, similarly to that previous creator I've worked with, this person will go unnamed, and I will not be providing the identity of the original bot creator. Any DMs asking for the name of the original creator will be ignored, and any comments either asking for or putting a name to said creator will be promptly deleted.

There's too many of these I'm doing, so no artist links will be provided. If you drop the artist in the comments, I'll pin that comment.
creator: Valendyne
